name: Aam Aadmi Party
founderBackground: Emerged from the 2011 Indian anti-corruption movement.

name: Bahujan Samaj Party
founderBackground: Founded by Kanshi Ram to represent Bahujans.
statedFocus: Social equality and representation for historically disadvantaged groups.
disclaimer: VoteWise provides factual data only. We do not endorse any party.

name: Bharatiya Janata Party
founderBackground: Originated from the Bharatiya Jana Sangh.
statedFocus: Cultural nationalism, integral humanism, and economic development.
governanceNote: Currently the ruling party at the national level and in several states.
disclaimer: VoteWise provides factual data only. We do not endorse any party.

name: Communist Party of India (Marxist)
founderBackground: Formed following a split from the Communist Party of India.
statedFocus: Marxism-Leninism, workers' rights, secularism, and social justice.
governanceNote: Currently governs Kerala and has historically governed West Bengal and Tripura.
disclaimer: VoteWise provides factual data only. We do not endorse any party.

name: Indian National Congress
founderBackground: Founded during the British Raj; played a central role in the Indian independence movement.
statedFocus: Secularism, democratic socialism, and inclusive growth.
governanceNote: Principal opposition party nationally; currently governs several states.
disclaimer: VoteWise provides factual data only. We do not endorse any party.

name: National People's Party
founderBackground: Founded by P. A. Sangma after his expulsion from the NCP.
statedFocus: Development of the North-East region and tribal rights.
governanceNote: Currently governs Meghalaya and is part of coalitions in other North-Eastern states.
disclaimer: VoteWise provides factual data only. We do not endorse any party.
